name: Qlik Cloud Analytics API
what_it_does: Qlik Cloud REST API and Engine API for programmatic access to Qlik analytics. Enables AI agents to query Qlik apps, execute expressions against Qlik's associative engine, reload datasets, manage spaces and content, and extract analytics data from Qlik Cloud for agentic workflows.
use_cases: Querying Qlik datasets and app data from enterprise analytics automation agents
Executing Qlik expressions and retrieving calculated metrics from reporting agents
Managing Qlik app reloads and data refreshes from data pipeline agents
Extracting dashboard data from Qlik Cloud for downstream AI analysis agents
not_for: Visual report building (API is for programmatic access, not visual authoring)
best_when: An enterprise with existing Qlik investment wants AI agents to query Qlik's associative engine, extract analytics data, and integrate BI results into automated decision workflows.
avoid_when: You're evaluating new BI tools — Qlik requires significant investment and expertise. API complexity (Engine API uses websockets) makes agent integration non-trivial.

auth.notes: Qlik Cloud OAuth 2.0 and API keys. Tenant-level configuration required. Machine-to-machine (M2M) tokens for headless agent access. Complex auth setup for Engine API (websocket + JWT).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Qlik Cloud pricing requires sales contact; enterprise licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Qlik Cloud Business and Enterprise editions; capacity-based pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing negotiated with Qlik sales. Significant investment required.

performance.rate_limits: Qlik API rate limits vary by tenant capacity and plan

known_agent_gotchas: Engine API uses websockets — not standard REST; significantly complicates agent integration
No public MCP server — complex custom integration required
Qlik's associative engine has unique data model concepts — agents need Qlik expertise
App reload operations are long-running and async
Enterprise pricing and complexity — significant commitment before AI agent integration makes sense
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise analytics with sensitive business data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth M2M for headless agents. Data residency options across regions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BI with sensitive analytics data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth M2M for agents. Global data residency options.
